states.name: Petra
states.title: Moonglow Witch
states.description: When Petra was a young girl, her mother gave her a rock she said was from the moon. Ever since, Petra's studied magic by way of moon veneration. She believes her magic will not work if she sleeps at night.

states.name: Petra
states.title: Moonglow Witch
states.description: Petra's moon magic requires sacrifice. However, this isn't sacrifice of life—it's sacrifice of sleep. She wakes others to interrupt their rest and leave them tired as part of her nightly rituals.
